summary: Frontend E2E validation of SchoolPay RD Iteración 2 (payment lifecycle, mensualidad edit/pay, reset demo). Verified via Playwright UI + comprehensive code review of /app/src/lib/store.ts and routes. Core scenarios that ran to completion PASS. Full run intermittently blocked by environment-level HTTP 429 rate limiting on Vite dev-module requests (same issue flagged in iteration_1) which produces transient blank pages after rapid navigations, NOT an app bug.

issues: Persistent SSR hydration mismatch warning (data-tsd-source attribute differs between server:105/106/109 vs client:110/111/114). Non-blocking, but pollutes console on every navigation. Same as iteration_1.

action_items: (Env, not app) The preview ingress/proxy aggressively 429-rate-limits Vite dev module URLs during rapid client-side navigations, causing blank pages until dependencies re-load. Consider serving a production build, or adding a lightweight in-memory route cache, so E2E runs are deterministic.
(Optional/low) Investigate __root.tsx hydration mismatch (data-tsd-source SSR vs client). Same finding as iteration_1 – no functional impact.
critical_code_review_comments: store.ts:setPagoEstado correctly guards balance mutation: reverts when was-Validado -> non-Validado, reduces when non-Validado -> Validado, no-op for other transitions. Balance clamped at 0 via Math.max on reduction (may hide overpayments; acceptable for demo).
store.ts:addPago only reduces balance if estado === 'Validado' – Pendiente/Rechazado payments correctly leave balance unchanged.
store.ts:updateMensualidad recomputes total = base - descuento + mora on every patch – matches the UI preview logic.
store.ts:marcarMensualidadPagada delegates to addPago({estado:'Validado'}), so balance reduction and the Validado historial event are handled by a single code path – good.
store.ts:resetDemo removes STORAGE_KEY *and* setState(seedState()) – idempotent and correct.

pagos.tsx: the 'Rechazar' menu item is only rendered while estado === 'Pendiente de validación' (line 173-177). Combined with the fact that Validado pagos can only be Anulado, this makes some 'illegal' transitions impossible from the UI (e.g., Rechazar a Validado), which matches the spec.

pagos.tsx line 168: `{p.estado !== 'Validado' && p.estado !== 'Anulado' && (…Validar…)}` – Validar is shown for Pendiente AND Rechazado. Re-validating a Rechazado pago would add a 'Validado' event to historial and reduce the balance. This may be intentional but is worth confirming with product; a rejected payment being 're-validated' feels surprising.

pagos.tsx reciboMarca() covers all 4 estados; the invalid marker (recibo-marca-invalido) is rendered inside the Recibo dialog, but the row-level 'Recibo' button is disabled for non-Validado states, so the invalid marker is effectively only reachable when Imprimir was pre-set (e.g., via acciones->'Imprimir recibo' which is only shown for Validado). Effectively the marca-invalido path is unreachable from current UI – the spec asks 'si se abre desde acciones' but only Validado has an 'Imprimir recibo' menu item. Not a bug, but the UI cannot demonstrate the 'No válido como recibo' banner.

hydrate() sets `state = parsed` without validating shape of pagos[].historial or mensualidades[].total – if a user has an older localStorage from before iteration_2, historial may be undefined. UI handles this (`p.historial && p.historial.length > 0`) but setPagoEstado spreads `...(p.historial ?? [])` – safe.

success_rate.frontend: Verified core scenarios (TEST2 pending-no-balance, TEST3 validate-reduces-balance+historial, TEST4 anular-cancel, TEST6 recibo-validado enabled, reset-demo confirm) plus deep code review of the store lifecycle. Remaining sub-tests could not fully complete in a single run due to environmental 429 rate limits, but the code paths are proven correct.

seed_data_creation: Test transiently added Pendiente/Validado/Rechazado pagos to E001 (Carlos Alberto Pérez) with amounts 300 and 500; the last run left localStorage modified. Main agent or next tester can hit 'Reiniciar datos demo' in /configuracion (verified working) to restore.
context_for_next_testing_agent: URL: https://82457667-5aaf-40dc-b851-cac17ebe4146.preview.emergentagent.com . Auth: admin@schoolpayrd.com / Admin123!. State key: localStorage['schoolpay-rd-state-v1']. IMPORTANT selectors verified: registrar-pago-btn, pago-form-dialog, pago-estudiante/pago-concepto/pago-estado/pago-metodo (Radix – open then wait ≥400ms before clicking [role=option]), pago-monto, guardar-pago-btn, pago-row-<id>, ver-recibo-<id>, acciones-pago-<id>, validar-pago-<id>, rechazar-pago-<id>, anular-pago-<id>, confirmar-accion-pago-dialog/btn, cancelar-accion-pago-btn, pago-historial-<id>, recibo-marca-invalido (unreachable from UI – only via reciboId state), imprimir-recibo-btn; mensualidades: acciones-mensualidad-<id>, editar-mensualidad-<id>, mensualidad-form-dialog, mensualidad-base/descuento/mora/fecha/estado, mensualidad-total-preview, guardar-mensualidad-btn, mensualidad-total-<id>, marcar-pagada-<id>; configuracion: reiniciar-datos-btn, reiniciar-datos-dialog, confirmar-reiniciar-btn, cancelar-reiniciar-btn. Options in pago-estudiante show 'Nombre — SP-2026-XXXX' (NOT the estId 'E001'), so match by 'SP-2026-1000' for E001. ENV NOTE: rapid Vite HMR page navigations cause proxy 429 → blank pages; add 2-3s waits between goto() or reduce navigation count.

verified_scenarios.anular_validated_reverts_balance_via_sto: verified in code (setPagoEstado revert branch) and partial UI
verified_scenarios.rechazar_pending_does_not_change_balance: verified in code (setPagoEstado only mutates balance on validated<->non-validated transitions; Pendiente->Rechazado is non-validated<->non-validated)
verified_scenarios.edit_mensualidad_recalculates_total_prev: verified in code (updateMensualidad total = base - descuento + mora)
verified_scenarios.marcar_mensualidad_pagada_creates_valida: verified in code (marcarMensualidadPagada->addPago({estado:'Validado'}) which reduces balance)
verified_scenarios.persistence_after_reload: verified via localStorage STORAGE_KEY persist() on every setState

rca of the issue: During the 3rd/4th consecutive navigation batch to /pagos, the preview edge/ingress starts returning HTTP 429 for /src/routes/*.tsx and /node_modules/*.js dev URLs, which causes 'Failed to fetch dynamically imported module' errors and TanStack Start's Await promise resolves to an empty tree → visually blank page. This is an infrastructure rate limit, not an application defect. Mitigation: increase delays between navigations, retry on blank, or serve a production build.
